goal: Create and test one deterministic AlphaForge alpha candidate
strategist_task: Create a Python script `alpha_candidate.py` that implements a simple moving average crossover strategy using yfinance. The script should: 1) Fetch 1 year of daily OHLCV data for SPY. 2) Compute 20-day and 50-day simple moving averages. 3) Generate a buy signal when the 20-day SMA crosses above the 50-day SMA, and a sell signal when it crosses below. 4) Print the number of trades and final portfolio value assuming $10,000 initial capital and trading 100 shares per signal (no transaction costs). 5) Include a `if __name__ == '__main__':` block that runs the strategy and prints results.
